translation_findings.jp: 「花形」「問題児」「金のなる木」「負け犬」の4つに分類…
translation_findings.zh: …分为「明星产品（PPM）」「问题儿（PPM）」「现金牛（PPM）」「瘦狗（PPM）」四类…
translation_findings.en: …classified into four categories—Star, Problem Child, Cash Cow, and Dog—for analysis.
translation_findings.issue: Inline (PPM) disambiguator appended to every one of the four quadrant terms inside narrative prose — visually heavy and breaks reading flow. en side handles it naturally without parenthetical.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: In narrative ZH prose, drop the inline (PPM) disambiguator (it is already implied by the surrounding PPM context); keep the disambiguator only in standalone glossary entries.

translation_findings.jp: 金のなる木を育てよう
translation_findings.issue: Same (PPM) disambiguator inside a marketing-style figure caption looks unnatural; en omits it cleanly.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: Use 「培育现金牛」 (no parenthetical) inside captions/prose.
